TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tili, title = Tili, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tili} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == TiliÁčĄŚäõ nilaculan Tili "kamu nu te-tun: Dili nu pu-taw-ya a kamu: D√≠li duma anganaga sa:tili"nu tung-ti-wun a kitidaan itida i ti-wun a subal nu amisan. u tili sa nu tung-ti-wun tatelunga a minatu atu kitidaan misiwbay, u pahikukian malecad itaw ya nu binawlan atu hitay tininamin a micukaymas. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ tili nay i 1520 a muhcaab nu pitawya a tademaw kusayaway itini a mueneng, i 1596 a mihcaan mala putawya-tiwun a kakitidaan. sakakinatusa a nikalepacaw itawya sa u dipun ku mialaway. kinatusa malpacaw sa pacubelisen ku putawya nu mikiayaway a mueneg. 1975 a mihcaan namakay putawya a tuce palekal, u tilisa mala tatelungen a kitidaan.1976 amihcaan 7 abulad u tung-ti-wun maala nu in-ni a mupulung, u tili mala tung-ti-wun a kitidaan nu siyhu. i tung-ti-wun yu mikilim tu sapatideng tawya sa, misacacay tu masakaputay nu in-ni- ahitay caypisengal mibakuhac atu milpacaw, makaala tu malebut ku mapatayay. katukuh i 1999 a mihcaan, tung-ti-wun malaheci ku nipikuwan, kanamuhan nu pulunga kanatal a mikuwan. Katukuh 2002 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 20 ademiad, tung-ti-wun muliyaw aca patideng misacaca, tili kinacacay aca mapacekil mala tung-ti-wun a kakitidaan. tungtiwun u mincu kungheku "kamu nu tetun " Rep√ļblika Demokr√°tika Timor-LesteÔľõnuputawya a kamu::Rep√ļblica Democr√°tica de Timor-Leste", itini i nuwalian tu timulan a kitidaan u ti-wun a subal nuwalian sa u kanatal, naw putawya i mabaatay nu walian idaw tu sa kya kitidaan nu cacay "dumasa u awmen". :Rep√ļblika Demokr√°tika Timor-LesteÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica Democr√°tica de Timor-Leste),ťÄöÁ®ĪśĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂(Śĺ∑ť†ďŤ™ě:Timor Lorosa'eÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Timor-Leste), . 1999 amihcaan 8 abulad i aw-cu nu kitidaan amucuduh sa malakuwit kunipisingkiw kya masacacay, 2002 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 20 ademiad malingatu misiteked, 2002 a mihcaan 9a bulad 27 a demiad tatengaay tu milihida tu pulung nu kanatal, malasaka 191 a micumuday nu kanatal. u siy-hu nu tung-ti-wun micukaymas tu "Timor-Leste"itawya sa nu putawya ku kamu kamunu heni. śĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂śĒŅŚļúśé°ÁĒ®"Timor-Leste" . Leste nu putawya a kamu " wali" sananay a imi u Timor nanu in-ni-a kamu , nu "wali" sananay a imi. lesteśėĮŤĎ°Ť™ě"śĚĪ"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚÔľõŤÄĆTimorśú¨šĺÜśėĮŚćįŚįľŤ™ětimur,šĻüśėĮ"śĚĪ"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ. sisa utung-ti-wun ina kanatal a sasakamun mahida u sasliyut sananay a nagngan.nika i in-ni ku mikuwanay henay sa u tung-ti-wun, muwala tu "Timor Timur" a sapangangan, kyu sukep han u tng-ti-wun "Tim-tim". "Lorosa'e" win isa u te-tun han akamu u "wali" sananay a imi u tatahekalan nu cilal sa. ,śé°ÁĒ®"Timor Timur" "Tim-tim"."Lorosa'e" . u kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ usapamata" kitidaan nu tung-ti-wun šłĽśĘĚÁõģ:śĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂ŚúįÁźÜ tatamaylaw a buyubuyu'an nu depad u ladelademan I waliyan nu tungtiwun I wali timul, i in-du-ni-si-ya a maluyaluay a subal nu walyan a adidiay a maluyaluyay a subal, walian micapi tu aw-cu. . u lala' pasu tiwun a subal i nu walian pasanutipan a amisay a dadipasan nu bayu' maliwliw nu in-ni masacacay u huy-ti-aw-ku-han a kitidaan u tapal sa u a-taw-lu a subal, i nu tipan apala' atu in-ni u tipan a tiwunmalalutin. uliwliwyadah ku buyu', enal, dadangkayan u masa caledesay u lutulutuka kudemiad, tu mihmihcaan talakaw ku caledes, u acak tu suemet matatudung silaad; uduma a kitidaan sa u caledes tu hinauda ku demiad, tu cacay a mihcaan sa yadah ku udad. hinaadih sa u hekalay milaecusay sa u balad atu maisid ku buyu', u ninel, micungdusay a nine latu caledesay a misaliyutay a demiad. u hekal sapilacul sa idaw ku ekim, simal, nuhekal a bali' mung, daylisiki. . u kakalikan sa tada micukaymas tu bakan atu lamal hidan, kyu maletek ku kilang atu mahuna ku lala' kyu malawpes. liwliw nu tung-ti-wun a bayu' u tiwun ha a bayu' sau-abayu' atu panta a bayu' nu san-hu tabakiay a masatuluay a kalimucu' ku liwliw, idaw ku talakaw yadah ku cacanan nu san-hu a ba'ba'tuwan atu mulangaway. .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tir~…ĺi** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tir~…ĺi "kamu nu t…ô-tun: dir~…ĺi nu pu-taw-ja a kamu: d*r~…ĺi duma aŇčanaga sa:tir~…ĺi"nu tuŇč-ti-wun a kitidaan itida i ti-wun a subar~…ĺ nu amisan. u tir~…ĺi sa nu tuŇč-ti-wun tat…ôr~…ĺuŇča a minatu atu kitidaan misiwbaj, u pańßikukian mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad itaw ja nu binawr~…ĺan atu ńßitaj tininamin a mi ¶ukajmas. na…ôm…ôkan** tir~…ĺi naj i **** a muńß ¶aab nu pitawja a tad…ômaw kusajawaj itini a mu…ôn…ôŇč, i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa putawja-tiwun a kakitidaan. sakakinatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw itawja sa u dipun ku miar~…ĺawaj. kinatusa mar~…ĺpa ¶aw sa pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis…ôn ku putawja nu mikiajawaj a mu…ôn…ôg. **** a mińß ¶aan namakaj putawja a tu ¶…ô par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, u tir~…ĺisa mar~…ĺa tat…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôn a kitidaan.**** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad u tuŇč-ti-wun maar~…ĺa nu in-ni a mupur~…ĺuŇč, u tir~…ĺi mar~…ĺa tuŇč-ti-wun a kitidaan nu sijńßu. i tuŇč-ti-wun ju mikir~…ĺim tu sapatid…ôŇč tawja sa, misa ¶a ¶aj tu masakaputaj nu in-ni- ańßitaj ¶ajpis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mibakuńßa ¶ atu mir~…ĺpa ¶aw, makaar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku mapatajaj. katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan, tuŇč-ti-wun mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nipikuwan, kanamuńßan nu pur~…ĺuŇča kanatar~…ĺ a mikuwan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan * aj abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad, tuŇč-ti-wun mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a patid…ôŇč misa ¶a ¶a, tir~…ĺi kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ mar~…ĺa tuŇč-ti-wun a kakitidaan. tuŇčtiwun u min ¶u kuŇčńß…ôku "kamu nu t…ôtun " *…ôp*br~…ĺika d…ômokr*tika timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô*nuputawja a kamu::*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ômo ¶r*ti ¶a d…ô timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô", itini i nuwar~…ĺian tu timur~…ĺan a kitidaan u ti-wun a subar~…ĺ nuwar~…ĺian sa u kanatar~…ĺ, naw putawja i mabaataj nu war~…ĺian idaw tu sa kja kitidaan nu ¶a ¶aj "dumasa u awm…ôn". :*…ôp*br~…ĺika d…ômokr*tika timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô*****:*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ômo ¶r*ti ¶a d…ô timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô),*****(***:timor r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô*****:timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô), . **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad i aw- ¶u nu kitidaan amu ¶uduńß sa mar~…ĺakuwit kunipisiŇčkiw kja masa ¶a ¶aj, **** a mińß ¶aan * aj abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu misit…ôk…ôd, **** a mińß ¶aan *a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇčaaj tu mir~…ĺińßida tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺasaka *** a mi ¶umudaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. u sij-ńßu nu tuŇč-ti-wun mi ¶ukajmas tu "timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô"itawja sa nu putawja ku kamu kamunu ńß…ôni. *******"timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô" . r~…ĺ…ôst…ô nu putawja a kamu " war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi u timor nanu in-ni-a kamu , nu "war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi. r~…ĺ…ôst…ô***"*"*****timor******timur,**"*"***. sisa utuŇč-ti-wun ina kanatar~…ĺ a sasakamun mańßida u sasr~…ĺijut sananaj a nagŇčan.nika i in-ni ku mikuwanaj ńß…ônaj sa u tuŇč-ti-wun, muwar~…ĺa tu "timor timur" a sapaŇčaŇčan, kju suk…ôp ńßan u tŇč-ti-wun "tim-tim". "r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô" win isa u t…ô-tun ńßan akamu u "war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi u tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ sa. ,**"timor timur" "tim-tim"."r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô" . u kitidaan ** usapamata" kitidaan nu tuŇč-ti-wun ***:***** tatamajr~…ĺaw a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu d…ôpad u r~…ĺad…ôr~…ĺad…ôman i war~…ĺijan nu tuŇčtiwun i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ, i in-du-ni-si-ja a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuaj a subar~…ĺ nu war~…ĺjan a adidiaj a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a subar~…ĺ, war~…ĺian mi ¶api tu aw- ¶u. . u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pasu tiwun a subar~…ĺ i nu war~…ĺian pasanutipan a amisaj a dadipasan nu baju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu in-ni masa ¶a ¶aj u ńßuj-ti-aw-ku-ńßan a kitidaan u tapar~…ĺ sa u a-taw-r~…ĺu a subar~…ĺ, i nu tipan apar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu in-ni u tipan a tiwunmar~…ĺar~…ĺutin. ur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwjadańß ku buju Ē~ °, …ônar~…ĺ, dadaŇčkajan u masa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj u r~…ĺutur~…ĺutuka kud…ômiad, tu mińßmińß ¶aan tar~…ĺakaw ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, u a ¶ak tu su…ôm…ôt matatuduŇč sir~…ĺaad; uduma a kitidaan sa u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs tu ńßinauda ku d…ômiad, tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan sa jadańß ku udad. ńßinaadińß sa u ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj sa u bar~…ĺad atu maisid ku buju Ē~ °, u nin…ôr~…ĺ, mi ¶uŇčdusaj a nin…ô r~…ĺatu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a misar~…ĺijutaj a d…ômiad. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ sa idaw ku …ôkim, simar~…ĺ, nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺi Ē~ ° muŇč, dajr~…ĺisiki. . u kakar~…ĺikan sa tada mi ¶ukajmas tu bakan atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßidan, kju mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôk ku kir~…ĺaŇč atu mańßuna ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kju mar~…ĺawp…ôs. r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu tuŇč-ti-wun a baju Ē~ ° u tiwun ńßa a baju Ē~ ° sau-abaju Ē~ ° atu panta a baju Ē~ ° nu san-ńßu tabakiaj a masatur~…ĺuaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, idaw ku tar~…ĺakaw jadańß ku ¶a ¶anan nu san-ńßu a ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuwan atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj. .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == TiliÁčĄŚäõ nilaculan Tili "kamu nu te-tun: Dili nu pu-taw-ya a kamu: D√≠li duma anganaga sa:tili"nu tung-ti-wun a kitidaan itida i ti-wun a subal nu amisan. u tili sa nu tung-ti-wun tatelunga a minatu atu kitidaan misiwbay, u pahikukian malecad itaw ya nu binawlan atu hitay tininamin a micukaymas. naemekanś≠∑ŚŹ≤ tili nay i 1520 a muhcaab nu pitawya a tademaw kusayaway itini a mueneng, i 1596 a mihcaan mala putawya-tiwun a kakitidaan. sakakinatusa a nikalepacaw itawya sa u dipun ku mialaway. kinatusa malpacaw sa pacubelisen ku putawya nu mikiayaway a mueneg. 1975 a mihcaan namakay putawya a tuce palekal, u tilisa mala tatelungen a kitidaan.1976 amihcaan 7 abulad u tung-ti-wun maala nu in-ni a mupulung, u tili mala tung-ti-wun a kitidaan nu siyhu. i tung-ti-wun yu mikilim tu sapatideng tawya sa, misacacay tu masakaputay nu in-ni- ahitay caypisengal mibakuhac atu milpacaw, makaala tu malebut ku mapatayay. katukuh i 1999 a mihcaan, tung-ti-wun malaheci ku nipikuwan, kanamuhan nu pulunga kanatal a mikuwan. Katukuh 2002 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 20 ademiad, tung-ti-wun muliyaw aca patideng misacaca, tili kinacacay aca mapacekil mala tung-ti-wun a kakitidaan. tungtiwun u mincu kungheku "kamu nu tetun " Rep√ļblika Demokr√°tika Timor-LesteÔľõnuputawya a kamu::Rep√ļblica Democr√°tica de Timor-Leste", itini i nuwalian tu timulan a kitidaan u ti-wun a subal nuwalian sa u kanatal, naw putawya i mabaatay nu walian idaw tu sa kya kitidaan nu cacay "dumasa u awmen". :Rep√ļblika Demokr√°tika Timor-LesteÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Rep√ļblica Democr√°tica de Timor-Leste),ťÄöÁ®ĪśĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂(Śĺ∑ť†ďŤ™ě:Timor Lorosa'eÔľõŤĎ°ŤźĄÁČôŤ™ě:Timor-Leste), . 1999 amihcaan 8 abulad i aw-cu nu kitidaan amucuduh sa malakuwit kunipisingkiw kya masacacay, 2002 a mihcaan 5 ay abulad 20 ademiad malingatu misiteked, 2002 a mihcaan 9a bulad 27 a demiad tatengaay tu milihida tu pulung nu kanatal, malasaka 191 a micumuday nu kanatal. u siy-hu nu tung-ti-wun micukaymas tu "Timor-Leste"itawya sa nu putawya ku kamu kamunu heni. śĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂śĒŅŚļúśé°ÁĒ®"Timor-Leste" . Leste nu putawya a kamu " wali" sananay a imi u Timor nanu in-ni-a kamu , nu "wali" sananay a imi. lesteśėĮŤĎ°Ť™ě"śĚĪ"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚÔľõŤÄĆTimorśú¨šĺÜśėĮŚćįŚįľŤ™ětimur,šĻüśėĮ"śĚĪ"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ. sisa utung-ti-wun ina kanatal a sasakamun mahida u sasliyut sananay a nagngan.nika i in-ni ku mikuwanay henay sa u tung-ti-wun, muwala tu "Timor Timur" a sapangangan, kyu sukep han u tng-ti-wun "Tim-tim". "Lorosa'e" win isa u te-tun han akamu u "wali" sananay a imi u tatahekalan nu cilal sa. ,śé°ÁĒ®"Timor Timur" "Tim-tim"."Lorosa'e" . u kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ usapamata" kitidaan nu tung-ti-wun šłĽśĘĚÁõģ:śĚĪŚłĚśĪ∂ŚúįÁźÜ tatamaylaw a buyubuyu'an nu depad u ladelademan I waliyan nu tungtiwun I wali timul, i in-du-ni-si-ya a maluyaluay a subal nu walyan a adidiay a maluyaluyay a subal, walian micapi tu aw-cu. . u lala' pasu tiwun a subal i nu walian pasanutipan a amisay a dadipasan nu bayu' maliwliw nu in-ni masacacay u huy-ti-aw-ku-han a kitidaan u tapal sa u a-taw-lu a subal, i nu tipan apala' atu in-ni u tipan a tiwunmalalutin. uliwliwyadah ku buyu', enal, dadangkayan u masa caledesay u lutulutuka kudemiad, tu mihmihcaan talakaw ku caledes, u acak tu suemet matatudung silaad; uduma a kitidaan sa u caledes tu hinauda ku demiad, tu cacay a mihcaan sa yadah ku udad. hinaadih sa u hekalay milaecusay sa u balad atu maisid ku buyu', u ninel, micungdusay a nine latu caledesay a misaliyutay a demiad. u hekal sapilacul sa idaw ku ekim, simal, nuhekal a bali' mung, daylisiki. . u kakalikan sa tada micukaymas tu bakan atu lamal hidan, kyu maletek ku kilang atu mahuna ku lala' kyu malawpes. liwliw nu tung-ti-wun a bayu' u tiwun ha a bayu' sau-abayu' atu panta a bayu' nu san-hu tabakiay a masatuluay a kalimucu' ku liwliw, idaw ku talakaw yadah ku cacanan nu san-hu a ba'ba'tuwan atu mulangaway. .

ańßitaj ¶ajpis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mibakuńßa ¶ atu mir~…ĺpa ¶aw, makaar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku mapatajaj. katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan, tuŇč-ti-wun mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nipikuwan, kanamuńßan nu pur~…ĺuŇča kanatar~…ĺ ti-wun a subar~…ĺ nuwar~…ĺian sa u kanatar~…ĺ, naw putawja i mabaataj nu war~…ĺian idaw tu sa kja kitidaan nu ¶a ¶aj "dumasa u awm…ôn". :*…ôp*br~…ĺika d…ômokr*tika timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô*****:*…ôp*br~…ĺi ¶a d…ômo ¶r*ti ¶a d…ô timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô),*****(***:timor r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô*****:timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô), . **** amińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad i aw- ¶u nu kitidaan amu ¶uduńß sa mar~…ĺakuwit kunipisiŇčkiw kja masa ¶a ¶aj, **** a mińß ¶aan * aj abur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu misit…ôk…ôd, **** a mińß ¶aan *a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tat…ôŇčaaj tu mir~…ĺińßida tu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺasaka *** a mi ¶umudaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. u sij-ńßu nu tuŇč-ti-wun mi ¶ukajmas tu "timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô"itawja sa nu putawja ku kamu kamunu ńß…ôni. *******"timor-r~…ĺ…ôst…ô" . r~…ĺ…ôst…ô nu putawja a kamu " war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi u timor nanu in-ni-a kamu , nu "war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi. r~…ĺ…ôst…ô***"*"*****timor******timur,**"*"***. sisa utuŇč-ti-wun ina kanatar~…ĺ a sasakamun mańßida u sasr~…ĺijut sananaj a nagŇčan.nika i in-ni ku mikuwanaj ńß…ônaj sa u tuŇč-ti-wun, muwar~…ĺa tu "timor timur" a sapaŇčaŇčan, kju suk…ôp ńßan u tŇč-ti-wun "tim-tim". "r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô" win isa u t…ô-tun ńßan akamu u "war~…ĺi" sananaj a imi u tatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ sa. ,**"timor timur" "tim-tim"."r~…ĺorosa Ē~ °…ô" . u kitidaan ** usapamata" kitidaan nu tuŇč-ti-wun ***:***** tatamajr~…ĺaw a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu d…ôpad u r~…ĺad…ôr~…ĺad…ôman i war~…ĺijan nu tuŇčtiwun i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ, i in-du-ni-si-ja a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuaj a subar~…ĺ nu war~…ĺjan a adidiaj a mar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a subar~…ĺ, war~…ĺian mi ¶api tu aw- ¶u. . u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pasu tiwun a subar~…ĺ i nu war~…ĺian pasanutipan a amisaj a dadipasan nu baju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu in-ni masa ¶a ¶aj u ńßuj-ti-aw-ku-ńßan a kitidaan u tapar~…ĺ sa u a-taw-r~…ĺu a subar~…ĺ, i nu tipan apar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu in-ni u tipan a tiwunmar~…ĺar~…ĺutin. ur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwjadańß ku buju Ē~ °, …ônar~…ĺ, dadaŇčkajan u masa ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj u r~…ĺutur~…ĺutuka kud…ômiad, tu mińßmińß ¶aan tar~…ĺakaw ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, u a ¶ak tu su…ôm…ôt matatuduŇč sir~…ĺaad; uduma a kitidaan sa u ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs tu ńßinauda ku d…ômiad, tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan sa jadańß ku udad. ńßinaadińß sa u ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj sa u bar~…ĺad atu maisid ku buju Ē~ °, u nin…ôr~…ĺ, mi ¶uŇčdusaj a nin…ô r~…ĺatu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj a misar~…ĺijutaj a d…ômiad. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ sa idaw ku …ôkim, simar~…ĺ, nuńß…ôkar~…ĺ a bar~…ĺi Ē~ ° muŇč, dajr~…ĺisiki. . u kakar~…ĺikan sa tada mi ¶ukajmas tu bakan atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßidan, kju mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôk ku kir~…ĺaŇč atu mańßuna ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° kju mar~…ĺawp…ôs. r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu tuŇč-ti-wun a baju Ē~ ° u tiwun ńßa a baju Ē~ ° sau-abaju Ē~ ° atu panta a baju Ē~ ° nu san-ńßu tabakiaj a masatur~…ĺuaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, idaw ku tar~…ĺakaw jadańß ku ¶a ¶anan nu san-ńßu a ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuwan atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj. .
